hooks.prompt: Review the staged changes (run `git diff --staged`) for code quality, reuse opportunities, and efficiency issues. Apply minimal fixes if needed. Do NOT change test files or config files. Only fix issues in application code. Be concise -- skip if changes look clean.

Invoke the /review skill to review the staged changes (run `git diff --staged`) for correctness bugs, security issues, and style deviations. If /review is PR-focused and no PR exists for this branch, adapt and run the review directly on the staged diff. Report findings as a concise bulleted list with file:line references. Do NOT auto-apply fixes -- the /simplify hook handles that. Skip if changes look clean.
